content_en:
The dead should be buried in the same area where they died. Transporting the body to another area or another country is not permissible, because it contradicts the ProphetвҖҷs (r) order to hasten the burial and it also necessitates 5 Ihraam represents the consecrated state of one who has made the intention for pilgrimage and has put on the specified garments. 6 Talbeeyah a the prayer repeated aloud by pilgrims at the beginning of вҖҳUmrah or Hajj. 7 Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.2, pp.199-200, nos. 355-357, Sahih Muslim, vol.2, pp.596-7, nos.2747 & 2750 and Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.920, no.3232. 8 Collected in all of the six books of hadith. Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.2, p.225, no.401, Sahih Muslim, vol.2, p.448, no.2059, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, pp.897-8, no. 3153, Sunan Ibn -i- Majah, vol.2, p.382, no.1477 and Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.1, p.338.

unnecessary aditional expenses. Furthermore, the Prophet (r) specifically forbade his followers from transferring of bodies from the local in which they died. ЩҺпә©Щҗ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„о ўпә’о  п»ҘЩҗ п»Ӣо ўпәҺпә’ЩҗпәӯЩҗ пә’о   пә о ўп»Ҙо  п»Ӣ : о ¬п»Ёп№¶пәҺпә©Щҗп»ұ пәҚп»ҹп»Ёпұ пә’Щҗп»Іо Ў п»Өо  пәҺпәҖо   п»“п№¶пә о ўп»Ўо Ўп»“Щҗп»Ёп№¶п»¬о ўпә©ЩҚ п»ҹЩҗп»Ёп№¶пә©о Ў пәғЩҸпәӨо  п»Ўо ўп»ӯо  п» п№ҫп»Ёп№¶пәҺ пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»ҳп№¶пәҳп№ҫп» п№¶п»° п»ҙо  п»Өо  п»ңп№ёп»Ёпұ пәҺ пәӨ r п»“п№¶п»ҳп№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ п»ӯЩ„ЩҺ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ о Ўпәҙо   пәӯо ЁпәҮЩҗп»Ҙ r о ўп»Ўо Ўп»Ёп№¶пәҺп»«о ўпә©о  пә©о   п»“п№¶пәӯо ўпәҺпә Щҗп»ҢЩҗп»¬Щҗп»Ўо  п»Җо  п»“Щҗп»Ёп№ёп»ӯпәҚ пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»ҳп№¶пәҳп№ҫп» п№¶п»° п»“Щҗп»І п»Өо ў пәҳп№¶пә©о ў пәғЩҺп»Ҙо ўп»ңп№ёп»Ўо Ўпәӯо Ўпә„Щ’п»Өо   п»ҙ . Jaabir ibn вҖҳAbdillaah said, вҖңOn the day of the Battle of Uhud,9 the dead were being carried [back to Madeenah] for burial in al-BaqeeвҖҳ,10 when the ProphetвҖҷs (r) announcer called out: AllaahвҖҷs Messenger orders you to bury the dead where they lie.вҖқ This [announcement came] after my mother had already tied my father and uncle to the sides of her camel, in order to bury them in al-BaqeeвҖҷ. However, she returned them to where they were killed (for burial).вҖқ11 Imaam an-Nawawee in his book, al-Athkaar, said, вҖңIf [the dying person] requests writes in his will that his body be transported to another country, it should not be fulfilled. Because transporting the dead to another local is haraam according to the authentic position held by most scholars.вҖқ12
content_id: Jenazah hendaknya dikubur di tempat yang sama dengan tempat ia meninggal. Memindahkan jenazah ke daerah atau negara lain tidak diperbolehkan, karena hal itu bertentangan dengan perintah Nabi п·ә untuk mempercepat penguburan dan juga mengakibatkan biaya tambahan yang tidak perlu. Selain itu, Nabi п·ә secara khusus melarang para pengikutnya memindahkan jenazah dari tempat mereka meninggal. Jabir bin Abdillah berkata, "Pada hari Perang Uhud, para korban gugur sedang dibawa untuk dimakamkan di Baqi', ketika juru bicara Nabi п·ә berseru: Rasulullah п·ә memerintahkan kalian untuk menguburkan para korban di tempat mereka terbunuh." Imaam an-Nawawi dalam kitabnya Al-Adzkar berkata, "Jika (orang yang sekarat) meminta atau menulis dalam wasiatnya agar jasadnya dipindahkan ke negara lain, hal itu tidak boleh dipenuhi. Karena memindahkan jenazah ke tempat lain adalah haram menurut pendapat sahih yang dipegang mayoritas ulama."
